title: Lightweight Interactions
body:
## ❓ What is Lightweight Interactions?
Lightweight Interactions is a lightweight adventure and magic modpack, it is designed to add more difficulty, content, and fun to minecraft. Lightweight Interactions is the best modpack for worse devices and even the best devices, this is because of the content and the optimisation.

## 📜 How is Lightweight Interactions better than other modpacks?
Lightweight Interactions is meant for everyone, for example, it is great for people who like a challenge, but it is still easy enough for beginners to play and still have fun. Lightweight Interactions is also designed to not have performance tanking mods and should work on the worst of hardware.

## 💠 What is in Lightweight Interactions?
The main mods in Lightweight Interactions are: 
- Epic adventures - Tobyplowy.
- Another furniture - Crispytwig.
- Essentials mod - Sparkuniverse.
- Naturalist - Crispytwig.
- Mod menu - Terraformers.

If you are the creator of one of the mods in this modpack, you can message me if you want credits 👍.

## 💻 Hardware requirements.
To run this modpack you need at least:
- 8GB of RAM.
- At least one of these processors: I5 1135g7, I3 10100, or Ryzen 3 3100.
- At least the igpu on the I5 1135g7, but is recommended to be at least a GTX 750 ti.

## 🙋‍♂️ Q/A

<details>
<summary>Will this run on my laptop??</summary>

Yes! This modpack is designed to be able to run on worse laptops whilst still having fun content.

</details>

<details>
<summary>How much content is there?</summary>

I have attempted to add as much content and add as much features, but the limitations of computer hardware has limited the features this can have because of what I am trying to make this modpack be.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Will there be support for other versions/mod loaders?</summary>

I do not think I will add support for any other versions because of how some mods/texturepacks are incompatible with other versions. But if possible in future I will add support for other versions, and hopefully will create a neoforge version very soon.

</details>
